case_title: PATEL, NAVNIT vs. KEARNEY, ,MATTHEW et al

DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KEARNEY, ,MATTHEW

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, NAVNIT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. & DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. JUDG- MENT FOR PL. FOR REST. PREMISES AT 905 COLUMBUS, RM.240 - COSTS WVD. - IF DEF DOESN'T VACATE BY 7-16-93, HE PAYS PL. $200 R&D - WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 7-16-93.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KEARNEY, ,MATTHEW ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-06-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEARNEY, ,MATTHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 905 COLUMBUS AVE, ROOM #240, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-16-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, STAYED MIDNIGHT & RENT WAIVED IF DEFT VACATES BY 7/16/93
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
